product_updates.title: Anthropic is having a month
product_updates.content: A human really borks things at Anthropic for the second time this week.

product_updates.title: Salesforce announces an AI-heavy makeover for Slack, with 30 new features
product_updates.content: Slack just got a whole lot more useful.

product_updates.title: OpenAI, not yet public, raises $3B from retail investors in monster $122B fund raise
product_updates.content: OpenAI's latest funding round, led by Amazon, Nvidia, and SoftBank, values the AI lab at $852 billion as it nears an IPO.

product_updates.title: Yupp shuts down after raising $33M from a16z crypto’s Chris Dixon
product_updates.content: Less than a year after launching, with checks from some of the biggest names in Silicon Valley, crowdsourced AI model feedback startup Yupp is closing its business, the company said Tuesday.

product_updates.title: Alexa+ gets new food ordering experiences with Uber Eats and Grubhub
product_updates.content: You can now order from Uber Eats and Grubhub using Alexa+, an experience Amazon says will be similar to chatting with a waiter at a restaurant or placing an order at a drive-thru.

product_updates.title: Nomadic raises $8.4 million to wrangle the data pouring off autonomous vehicles
product_updates.content: The company turns footage from robots into structured, searchable datasets with a deep learning model.

product_updates.title: Exclusive: Runway launches $10M fund, Builders program to support early-stage AI startups
product_updates.content: Runway is launching a $10 million fund and startup program to back companies building with its AI video models, as it pushes toward interactive, real-time “video intelligence” applications.

product_updates.title: With its new app store, Ring bets on AI to go beyond home security
product_updates.content: Ring's app store will allow the company to target broader use cases beyond security, like elder care or business needs.

technical_breakthroughs.title: Quantum computers need vastly fewer resources than thought to break vital encryption
technical_breakthroughs.content: No, the sky isn't falling, but Q Day is coming, and it won't be as expensive as thought.

technical_breakthroughs.title: Shifting to AI model customization is an architectural imperative
technical_breakthroughs.content: In the early days of large language models (LLMs), we grew accustomed to massive 10x jumps in reasoning and coding capability with every new model iteration. Today, those jumps have flattened into incremental gains. The exception is domain-specialized intelligence, where true step-function improv…

technical_breakthroughs.title: The Download: AI health tools and the Pentagon’s Anthropic culture war
technical_breakthroughs.content: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. There are more AI health tools than ever—but how well do they work? In the last few months alone, Microsoft, Amazon, and OpenAI have all launched medical chatb…

technical_breakthroughs.title: AI benchmarks are broken. Here’s what we need instead.
technical_breakthroughs.content: For decades, artificial intelligence has been evaluated through the question of whether machines outperform humans. From chess to advanced math, from coding to essay writing, the performance of AI models and applications is tested against that of individual humans completing tasks. This framing i…
